t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Primary key identifying the tradeable instrument pair. Allocated by Trade.InstrumentAdd during instrument creation. Ranges from 0 (system placeholder) to ~21 million IDs allocated. Referenced by virtually every trading fact table and the Dim_Currency / Dim_HistorySplitRatio dimension tables.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Primary key identifying the tradeable instrument pair. Allocated by Trade.InstrumentAdd during instrument creation. Referenced by virtually every trading fact table and the Dim_Currency / Dim_HistorySplitRatio dimension tables. Passthrough from Dim_Instrument via Symbol/ISIN/CUSIP matching against Apex staging data.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped sentinel/range info ('Ranges from 0 (system placeholder) to ~21 million IDs allocated'). Injected non-upstream lineage text about passthrough mechanism.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries. Passthrough from Dim_Instrument.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Missed inheritance: dim-lookup passthrough should be Tier 1 with Dim_Instrument wiki description verbatim, but tagged as Tier 2. Added non-upstream text 'Passthrough from Dim_Instrument'.

issues.problem: Tagged Tier 2 (SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData) but this is a dim-lookup passthrough (SELECT Dim_Instrument.InstrumentDisplayName with no transform). Per tier rules, should be Tier 1 with the Dim_Instrument wiki description verbatim.

Tier 1 description paraphrased: dropped 'Ranges from 0 (system placeholder) to ~21 million IDs allocated' from upstream wiki. Injected non-upstream lineage text ('Passthrough from Dim_Instrument via Symbol/ISIN/CUSIP matching against Apex staging data') that belongs in Section 5, not in a Tier 1 verbatim description.
Lineage file marks InstrumentDisplayName as Tier 2 with 'Dim-lookup passthrough' note, contradicting the dim-lookup passthrough rule which requires Tier 1.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section. Footer says 'Phases: 13/14' but doesn't identify which phase was skipped or provide P2/P3 completion evidence.

Description says 'Not included in the main PnL formula' but the column's purpose relative to downstream consumption is ambiguous — is it purely informational or expected to be used by consumers for adjusted reconciliation?

(2) Fix InstrumentID Tier 1 description to restore dropped text: 'Ranges from 0 (system placeholder) to ~21 million IDs allocated.' and remove injected passthrough mechanism text. (3) Update lineage file to mark InstrumentDisplayName as Tier 1. (4) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist section. (5) Update footer tier counts to 2 T1 / 19 T2.
